banner.text: EU & British residents: You can vote in 2027 but must register first.
hero.subtitle: Citizens running for their town — not politicians running for power. 47% of Sitges residents have never had a unified voice. United for Sitges changes that.
hero.stat1.label: Registered Residents
hero.stat2.label: Born outside Catalonia
hero.stat3.label: Votes won 2023 election
hero.stat4.label: Votes needed for majority
votingRights.title: Who can vote in Sitges?
votingRights.subtitle: Not all residents have the same voting rights in Spanish municipal elections. Check your status below — then take action.
cere.title: EU Citizens: Register on the CERE
cere.body: The CERE (Censo Electoral de Residentes Extranjeros Comunitarios) is managed by the INE. Only 10–20% of eligible EU expats in Spanish coastal towns are registered. Registering 3,000 new voters alone can deliver an absolute majority — and no party has ever tried this before.
cere.step1.title: Get your documents
cere.step1.body: Valid passport or EU ID card + proof of Sitges padrón registration
cere.step2.title: Fill in Modelo 1
cere.step2.body: Available at the INE office or the Sitges Ajuntament. Simple one-page form — takes 10 minutes
cere.step3.title: Stay registered
cere.step3.body: Once on the CERE, you remain registered for all future municipal elections. You only need to do this once.
footer.description: A pro-Sitges movement for the 2027 municipal elections. Built by and for every resident who calls Sitges home.
footer.tagline: Your Town. Your Vote. Your Future.
footer.copyright: © 2026 United for Sitges. All rights reserved. Subject to Spanish electoral law.
join.title: Register your support
join.subtitle: Add your name. Spread the word. Help us reach the 47% — and win.
join.form.newsletter: Send me campaign updates and voter registration reminders
join.success.title: You're in. Thank you!
join.success.body: We'll be in touch with your voter registration guide and campaign updates. Welcome to the movement.
donate.title: Fund the movement
donate.subtitle: Secure payment. Any amount helps.
